skill.name: amazon-asin-lookup-api-skill
skill.description: This skill helps users extract structured product details from Amazon using a specific ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number). Use this skill when the user asks to get Amazon product details by ASIN, lookup Amazon product title and price using ASIN, extract Amazon product ratings and reviews count for a specific ASIN, check Amazon product availability and current price, get Amazon product description and features via ASIN, enrich product catalog with Amazon data using ASIN, monitor Amazon product price changes for specific ASINs, retrieve Amazon product brand and material information, fetch Amazon product images and specifications by ASIN, validate Amazon ASIN and get product metadata.
skill.summary: Retrieve structured Amazon product details by ASIN using the BrowserAct API
skill.author: browser-act

security_audit.summary: The static analysis found 57 potential issues with a risk score of 100/100, but manual evaluation confirms all are false positives or expected patterns for this legitimate API-wrapper skill. The skill makes documented HTTP requests to api.browseract.com, reads a declared BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable, and executes a Python script -- all operations are transparent, serve the declared Amazon product lookup purpose, and show no evidence of malicious intent, data exfiltration, obfuscation, or prompt injection.

content.user_title: Look Up Amazon Product Details by ASIN
content.value_statement: This skill retrieves structured Amazon product data using an ASIN number. It eliminates the need for manual browsing or custom web scraping solutions.
actual_capabilities: Look up product title, brand, and category by ASIN
Get current price, original price, and discount information
Retrieve ratings, review counts, and featured badges
Extract product descriptions and special features
Access material, color, style, and compatibility details
Generate full Amazon product URLs from ASINs
limitations: Requires a BrowserAct API key configured as an environment variable
Only works with valid Amazon ASIN identifiers
Task execution may take several minutes to complete
Does not support bulk ASIN lookups in a single API call

use_cases.title: Product Catalog Enrichment
use_cases.description: An e-commerce data analyst retrieves full product details for a list of ASINs to update their online store database with accurate Amazon pricing and descriptions.

use_cases.title: Competitive Price Monitoring
use_cases.description: A pricing researcher looks up Amazon prices for key products to compare against competitor listings and identify pricing trends.

use_cases.title: Product Specification Research
use_cases.description: A product manager extracts detailed specifications, materials, and features of Amazon products to inform purchasing or catalog management decisions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic ASIN Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Look up product details for Amazon ASIN B07TS6R1SF and show me the title, current price, and rating.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick single-product lookup for one-time use

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Product Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find product information for ASIN B08N5WRWNW. I need the brand, material, color options, special features, and full product description for a catalog entry.

prompt_templates.title: Price Verification with Error Handling
prompt_templates.prompt: Check the current price and availability for ASIN B09G9D7K6S. If the lookup fails due to an authorization error, let me know my API key needs renewal. Retry once if it is a temporary network issue.
prompt_templates.scenario: Reliable price checking with automatic retry

prompt_templates.title: Batch ASIN Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: I have a list of ASINs: B07TS6R1SF, B08N5WRWNW, B09G9D7K6S. Look up each one and create a summary table with product title, current price, rating, and brand. Process them one at a time and compile the results.

output_examples.input: Look up product details for Amazon ASIN B07TS6R1SF
output_examples.output:
Product: Fire TV Stick 4K
Brand: Amazon
Current Price: $49.99
Rating: 4.7 out of 5 stars (125,430 ratings)
Key Features: Alexa voice remote, Dolby Vision, HDR10+
Available at: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07TS6R1SF

output_examples.input: Get detailed specifications for ASIN B08N5WRWNW including materials and color options
output_examples.output:
Product: Echo Dot (4th Gen)
Brand: Amazon
Colors Available: Charcoal, Glacier White, Twilight Blue
Material: Fabric, recycled plastics
Current Price: $49.99 (Original: $59.99, Save $10.00)
Rating: 4.6 out of 5 stars (315,872 ratings)
Special Features: Alexa, multi-room music, built-in temperature sensor
Compatible Devices: All Alexa-enabled devices

best_practices: Set the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable before running any lookups to avoid authentication errors
Verify that the ASIN is a valid 10-character alphanumeric string before making a request to prevent wasted API calls
Implement a retry mechanism for transient errors but limit retries to one attempt to avoid infinite loops
anti_patterns: Hardcoding the API key directly in the script or configuration instead of using environment variables
Making multiple concurrent lookup requests without checking rate limits set by the BrowserAct API
Ignoring the Invalid authorization error and repeatedly retrying instead of asking the user to renew their API key

faq.question: What is an ASIN?
faq.answer: ASIN stands for Amazon Standard Identification Number. It is a 10-character alphanumeric unique identifier assigned to each product on Amazon.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a BrowserAct API key. Set it as the BROWSERACT_API_KEY environment variable before using the skill.

faq.question: How long does a single product lookup take?
faq.answer: Each lookup may take several minutes. The skill polls the API until the task completes and provides status updates during execution.

faq.question: What product information can I retrieve?
faq.answer: You can get the product title, brand, current and original prices, discount amount, ratings, review count, description, features, color, material, style, and compatible devices.

faq.question: Can I look up multiple ASINs at the same time?
faq.answer: This skill processes one ASIN per request. For multiple products, make separate lookup calls for each ASIN.

faq.question: What happens if my API key is invalid or expired?
faq.answer: The skill returns an Invalid authorization error. You need to renew your BrowserAct API key and set it again as the environment variable.
